title: Just-Download (Product Platform)
description: Lightweight platform designed to distribute software and tools with a fast and minimal user interface.
problem: Many download websites are slow and cluttered, making it difficult for users to access tools quickly.
architecture: Static Website → Asset Hosting → Download Distribution Layer
impact: Provides a simple and fast platform to distribute software tools.

title: Lifeline Blood Donor System
description: Web application designed to connect blood donors with patients during medical emergencies.
problem: Finding blood donors during emergencies often relies on manual communication and scattered data.
architecture: React Client → API Layer → MongoDB → Donor Availability System
impact: Centralized system for searching donors and managing blood requests.

title: Taste Of India Recipe Platform
description: Community-driven recipe sharing platform where users can submit recipes and admins approve content.
problem: Recipe platforms often lack moderation systems for user-generated content.
architecture: React Frontend → API Server → Database → Admin Moderation
impact: Allows users to share recipes while maintaining content quality through admin approval.

title: Docker Multi-Environment Setup
description: Containerized development environment for running multiple technology stacks without conflicts.
problem: Managing multiple development environments locally can cause dependency conflicts.
architecture: Docker Compose → Containerized Services → Volume Mapping
impact: Provides clean isolated environments for development.

title: Mood Tab Chrome Extension
description: Motivational Chrome extension that displays animated themes and quotes based on selected moods.
problem: Default browser new tabs lack personalization and emotional engagement.
architecture: Chrome API → Local Storage → Dynamic Theme Engine
impact: Improves user experience by providing mood-based inspiration.

title: My Dev Space
description: Personal development workspace for experimenting with tools, scripts, and development workflows.
problem: Developers need a flexible environment to experiment without affecting production projects.
architecture: Local Workspace → Tool Experiments → Script Modules
impact: Improves productivity by providing a controlled development sandbox.
